TABLE.NAME: format_smartcards_appearance
TABLE.COMMENT: Custom card appearance (image/emoji/icon and colours) per activity or section

FIELD.NAME: itemid
FIELD.COMMENT: cmid when contextlevel=activity, sectionid when contextlevel=section

FIELD.NAME: value
FIELD.COMMENT: fileid, single emoji, or library icon name, depending on type

FIELD.NAME: bgcolor
FIELD.COMMENT: #RRGGBB or the literal 'transparent', background colour of the card circle

FIELD.NAME: labelcolor
FIELD.COMMENT: #RRGGBB title colour, restricted to the curated palette

FIELD.NAME: labelfont
FIELD.COMMENT: Slug of the curated bundled font, null = system font

FIELD.NAME: iconcolor
FIELD.COMMENT: #RRGGBB icon glyph colour, only meaningful when type=icon

FIELD.NAME: displaymode
FIELD.COMMENT: 'tile' to force a custom-cmlist-item activity (e.g. Label) to render as a normal clickable tile instead of inline; null = use the activity type's own default
